title: TopicFrontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter for a topic Markdown file. Every field here is the canonical record; rendered HTML and learner artifacts are derived from it.

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier. Must match the filename (without .md) and a slug in curriculum.json.

title.description: Human-readable topic title shown in the curriculum index.

examWeightPct.description: Approximate exam weight from the PSI Candidate Information Bulletin. Must match curriculum.json.

difficulty.description: Difficulty tier for this topic variant. All current topics use 'standard'. 'foundation' and 'advanced' are reserved for difficulty-split variants added in Phase 4+. See docs/content-model.md §Difficulty Expansion.

reviewStatus.description: Lifecycle state. Only 'published' topics render in production. CI blocks topics with broken source refs from advancing past 'draft'.

version.description: Semver string. PATCH = copy edits. MINOR = content additions or reordered sections. MAJOR = structural rewrite or source change.

lastValidatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when a subject-matter reviewer last confirmed this topic against its source references. Null until first review pass.

audioScriptEstMinutes.description: Estimated listening time in minutes for the Audio Script section. Used to display reading-time badges and plan audio asset production.

sourceRefs.description: IDs referencing entries in sources.json. Every published topic must include at least one Tier 1 source. CI checks all IDs resolve.

learningObjectives.description: Observable, exam-relevant objectives. Start each with an action verb: Identify, Explain, Distinguish, Apply, Calculate, Recall.

glossaryTermSlugs.description: Slugs of glossary terms defined or prominently featured in this topic. Must exist in glossary.json. CI enforces referential integrity.

prerequisites.description: Optional. Topic slugs learners should complete before this one. Drives the recommended study order UI.
